flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Minnesota-Morris fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 936).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Minnesota-Morris rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (45.6% → 50.3%).
